# Smart Product Restock Notifier (Uplizd) - Automated inventory alerts for revenue recovery

## Summary
The Smart Product Restock Notifier is an intelligent Uplizd AI workflow that monitors inventory levels and automatically triggers personalized customer notifications when items return to stock. By integrating real-time data from Klaviyo with your product catalog, this solution eliminates manual tracking, reduces customer churn, and maximizes revenue by capturing high-intent shoppers the moment products become available.

---
